name: Lyceum Northwestern University
tagline: Built for Future Doctors. Premium Medical Education at an Affordable Cost.
description: Lyceum Northwestern University offers a world-class medical education that is NMC aligned, English medium, and globally recognized. Designed for ambitious Indian students who want quality education without compromising on affordability.
highlights: NMC Aligned — Fully compliant with National Medical Commission guidelines
English Medium — Study confidently in a fully English-speaking environment
WHO Recognized — Internationally accredited medical program
Affordable Tuition — Quality education without heavy financial burden
Real Clinical Exposure — Hands-on hospital training from early stages
program: 4.5 years MD Program (1 year pre-medicine + 4.5 years medical studies)

name: Davao Medical School Foundation
tagline: Real Hospital Exposure That Makes You a Doctor.
description: Davao Medical School Foundation is one of the Philippines' premier medical institutions, offering exceptional clinical exposure and internationally recognized medical education. DMSF equips students with practical skills and real-world medical experience.
highlights: Exceptional clinical training and hospital exposure
Strong FMGE and PLE pass rates
Modern campus with advanced medical facilities
program: MD Program — Internationally recognized medical degree

name: Brokenshire College
tagline: Excellence in Medical Education Since Decades.
description: Brokenshire College offers a comprehensive medical education program with strong emphasis on clinical training and patient care. Located in Davao, Philippines, it provides a nurturing environment for aspiring doctors.
program: MD Program — Aligned with international medical standards

name: Global College of Medicine
tagline: Affordable Fees. Global Standards. Life-Changing Learning.
description: Global College of Medicine delivers quality medical education aligned with international standards. With no donation or capitation fees, it offers a transparent and affordable path to becoming a doctor.
highlights: Extensive clinical training and hands-on exposure
program: 4.5 years MD Program — 1 year pre-medicine + 4.5 years medical studies. Aligned with NMC guidelines.

name: UCTS
tagline: Medical Education in the Heart of Southeast Asia.
description: UCTS offers medical education in Timor-Leste, providing students with a unique international learning experience in Southeast Asia. The program is designed to produce competent and compassionate medical professionals.
highlights: Small class sizes for personalized learning

name: University of PEACE
tagline: Building Doctors for a Peaceful Tomorrow.
description: University of PEACE in Timor-Leste offers a unique medical education experience in one of Southeast Asia's newest nations. The program focuses on developing skilled, compassionate doctors ready for the global healthcare landscape.
highlights: International medical education in Southeast Asia
program: MD Program — Internationally oriented medical degree
